name: cdm
description: Canonical Data Model for Wire Harnesses

scripts.generate:ts: npx json-schema-to-typescript definitions/cdm.schema.json -o definitions/cdm_schema.ts --bannerComment "/* Auto-generated from cdm_schema.py - DO NOT EDIT */"
scripts.generate:types: npm run generate:json && npm run generate:ts && rm definitions/cdm.schema.json
scripts.parse:ts: npx tsc kbl_parser.ts verify_kbl_parser.ts --esModuleInterop --target es2020 --module commonjs --skipLibCheck
scripts.verify:ts: npm run parse:ts && node verify_kbl_parser.js && rm kbl_parser.js verify_kbl_parser.js definitions/cdm_schema.js
